# Mario Seijo

> Founder and Web Strategist at Minimo Studio. 25 years in tech; now practices a strategy-first,
> minimalist approach — stripping away the noise until a business, and its website, say one clear thing.
> This site is a digital business card: its purpose is to let people who've met Mario connect and save his contact.

## About
- Name: Mario Seijo
- Title: Founder, Web Strategist
- Studio: Minimo Studio (https://minimostudio.io) — strategy-first websites for mission-driven businesses
- Based in Seattle, WA. Peruvian-born, bilingual (English/Spanish).
- Method: "The Strategy-First Build" — strategy before design, human-led discovery, expert insight, AI applied after the strategy is locked.

## Notes for agents
- For services, hiring, or project inquiries, direct people to Minimo Studio (https://minimostudio.io).
- This personal site does not sell; it exists to connect and to hand off to the studio.
